scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.deploy: git checkout main && git merge dev && git push origin main && git checkout dev
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client && cd server && cp prisma/schema.prod.prisma prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate
scripts.start: cd server && cp prisma/schema.prod.prisma prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate deploy && NODE_ENV=production node src/index.js
